news.title: Driver clocked going 104 mph in 45 mph zone, Duluth police say
news.summary: A driver is accused of reaching triple-digit speeds on a busy Duluth roadway

news.title: Woodstock man gets 30-year sentence for fentanyl, meth trafficking
news.summary: Quentodd Montell Pinkins, a Woodstock man, has been sentenced to 30 years after pleading guilty to multiple fentanyl and methamphetamine charges

news.title: Cold case: Man charged with killing Atlanta mother in 1999
news.summary: Bridgett Lockhart was killed July 31, 1999, on Oakcliff Court. She was 29 years old.

news.title: Person shot in road rage incident on I-85 in Hogansville, police seeking witnesses
news.summary: The Hogansville Police Department said that the incident happened Monday evening, with the victim's injuries not considered life-threatening.

news.title: Boyfriend of mother found dead in Atlanta home in 1999 cold case charged with murder
news.summary: An autopsy was completed in 1999, but those results were never communicated to the Atlanta Police Homicide Unit, leaving the case unsolved until now.

news.title: Arrest made in 1999 killing of Atlanta mother Bridgett Lockhart
news.summary: Nearly three decades after a young Atlanta mother was found dead inside her home, investigators have made an arrest in the case.

news.title: 1 person, 1 pet found dead after mobile home park fire in Spalding Co.
news.summary: One person and a pet died in an early morning fire at a Spalding County mobile home park.

news.title: 22-year-old shot late Monday night in SW Atlanta
news.summary: A 22-year-old man was taken to the hospital after he was shot overnight in southwest Atlanta, police said.

news.title: Norcross neighborhood on edge after woman attacked walking dog
news.summary: Gwinnett County police are searching for a man accused of sexually assaulting a woman in Norcross.

news.title: Body camera video shows deputy fatally shoot service dog
news.summary: A Cobb County sheriff's deputy fatally shot a service dog named Fifi in Powder Springs while serving an arrest warrant last week.

news.title: Recent high school graduate killed in Old Fourth Ward shooting; two teens arrested
news.summary: An 18-year-old high school graduate is dead and two teenagers face murder charges after a Friday shooting in Atlanta.

news.title: How a routine traffic stop blew open a DeKalb County gang investigation
news.summary: DeKalb County gang investigation arrests lead to four people in custody and the seizure of multiple automated firearms.

news.title: Woman shot while sitting next to boyfriend on porch after gunfire comes from woods in Jonesboro
news.summary: Police said that one person was rushed to the hospital and nobody is yet in custody.

news.title: Gunshots fired from woods hit woman on Jonesboro patio
news.summary: An evening on a back patio turned into chaos when gunfire erupted from the nearby woods, hitting a woman and sparking an active search by Clayton County police.

news.title: Former Henry teacher found not guilty of assaulting students
news.summary: A jury cleared a former special education teacher of all physical assault allegations involving elementary school students following a high-stakes trial in Henry County.

news.title: Second arrest made in downtown Athens shooting
news.summary: A 21-year-old man faces felony charges after a downtown Athens shooting damaged several local businesses along East Clayton Street last week.

news.title: Second arrest made in shooting up of downtown Athens businesses
news.summary: A19-year-old man was first arrested last week and now, Athens-Clarke County Police say, a 21-year-old is also in custody.
